videos.title: Place Value to the Millions | Reading Large Numbers in Tables
videos.description: Learn how to read and understand large numbers like those found in wildlife population tables! Discover how place value works up to one million, so you can confidently read the big numbers that appear in data tables about elephants, tigers, and leopards across different states.

videos.title: Comparing Numbers | Greater Than, Less Than, and Equal To
videos.description: Learn how to compare large numbers using greater than (>), less than (<), and equal to (=) symbols! Practice comparing multi-digit numbers like the elephant, tiger, and leopard populations recorded in different states of India.

videos.title: Addition with Regrouping Song | 3-Digit Addition (Carry Over)
videos.description: Learn 3-digit addition with regrouping (carrying) through a catchy song! See step-by-step how to add large numbers by carrying over to the next column, just like adding up the total wildlife populations of elephants, tigers, and leopards across multiple states.

videos.title: Input-Output Tables Song | Number Patterns and Rules | 4th Grade
videos.description: Discover how addition patterns work using input-output tables! Learn to find the rule that connects input numbers to output numbers — a key skill that connects to the addition table patterns and number games explored in Chapter 10, like 'add 1 or 2 to reach 10'.

videos.title: Adding and Subtracting Large Numbers | 4th Grade Math
videos.description: Master adding and subtracting large 4-digit and 5-digit numbers using the standard column method! This lesson is perfect for solving multi-step word problems about wildlife populations — for example, finding the total number of elephants across Karnataka, Kerala, and Assam, or calculating how many more tigers live in one state versus another.
